title: Hershey warns it won't ‘fully meet consumer demand' this Halloween, Christmas

title: The Hershey Company (HSY) CEO Michele Buck on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: The Hershey Company (NYSE:HSY ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 28, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Melissa Poole - Vice President of Investor Relations Michele Buck - Chairman & Chief Executive Officer Steve Voskuil - Senior Vice President & Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Andrew Lazar - Barclays Alexia Howard - Bernstein Robert Moskow - Credit Suisse Ken Goldman - JPMorgan Jason English - Goldman Sachs Bryan Spillane - Bank of America Michael Lavery - Piper Sandler Chris Growe - Stifel Simon Negin - UBS Jonathan Feeney - Consumer Edge Operator Greetings, and welcome to The Hershey Company Second Quarter 2022 Question-and-answer session. title: Hershey (HSY) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates

title: HERSHEY DECLARES QUARTERLY DIVIDENDS
text: HERSHEY, Pa. , July 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Board of Directors of The Hershey Company (NYSE: HSY) today announced quarterly dividends of $1.036 on the Common Stock and $0.942 on the Class B Common Stock, an increase of approximately 15%, or $0.135 and $0.123 per share, respectively.

title: Hershey raises annual adjusted profit growth forecast
text: Hershey Co on Thursday raised its annual adjusted profit growth forecast, as the Kit Kat maker expects to benefit from price hikes and robust demand for its chocolates and candies.

title: Hershey Reports Second-Quarter 2022 Financial Results; Raises 2022 Net Sales and Earnings Outlook
text: HERSHEY, Pa. , July 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Hershey Company (NYSE: HSY) today announced net sales and earnings for the second quarter ended July 3, 2022, and raised its full-year financial outlook.

title: OrganiQ Kangaroo Island Teams With the Hershey's Brand to Introduce Luxurious Chocolate Body Scrub
text: ADELAIDE, Australia--(BUSINESS WIRE)--OrganiQ Kangaroo Island, an Australian clean beauty brand, today announced a partnership with the Hershey's brand to introduce a body treatment inspired by the classic Hershey's Milk Chocolate Candy Bar. Launching this fall, OrganiQ Hershey's Cacao Body Scrub provides a decadent selfcare experience using 100% natural, vegan, and cruelty free ingredients. title: Hershey, Skyworks Scheduled To Announce Annual Dividend Boosts In July
